blockers.description: The gsd-executor subagent (and even the orchestrator's Write tool) is blocked by sandbox/permission policy from writing files inside `example-projects/migration-consent/.vscode/`. The dir was successfully created via Bash mkdir, but Write tool calls to settings.json / settings.case-{1,2,3}.json were rejected by the user permission prompt. The 022-02 agent could write `behave.ini`, `features/*` but halted before any commit when it hit the .vscode block.
blockers.workaround: Either (a) ask user to interactively approve Write tool calls for these specific paths when resuming, (b) manually create the four .vscode JSON files outside Claude (e.g. via a terminal editor), or (c) run the 022-02 plan with /gsd-execute-phase 22 --interactive so the executor's permission prompts route directly to the user.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide how to unblock writes to example-projects/migration-consent/.vscode/*.json
human_actions_pending.context: These are integration-test fixture files, not real workspace settings. The plan needs four files: settings.json, settings.case-1.json, settings.case-2.json, settings.case-3.json. Empty `.vscode/` dir already exists on the main tree (created via Bash).

decisions.decision: Pre-create stub .vscode files on main tree before relaunching 022-02 (Option A from AskUserQuestion)
decisions.rationale: User selected this when offered Pre-create stubs / Grant permission / Inline-on-main options. Implementation stalled at the Write step because Write tool itself was rejected.

next_action: Resolve the .vscode write permission, then relaunch the 022-02 executor (see .continue-here.md `<next_action>` for the exact dispatch payload).
context_notes: Phase 22 has 3 plans across 2 waves. Wave 1 (022-01) and one half of Wave 2 (022-03) are merged into gabes/migration-consent. Only 022-02 remains. The .planning/STATE.md and .planning/ROADMAP.md edits are orchestrator-owned writes (begin-phase + two update-plan-progress calls) that have NOT yet been committed — they should be committed alongside the final verification, not now. After 022-02 lands, run gsd-verifier then update STATE/ROADMAP to phase-complete.
